criteria.label: Mode sequencing and prioritization
criteria.full_credit: Chooses audit before targeted polish, hardening, and measured optimization with coherent P0-P3 severity.

criteria.label: Hostile data and failure hardening
criteria.full_credit: Covers long and missing data, permissions, conflicts, limits, offline, retry, partial failures, uploads, and truthful save recovery.

criteria.label: Responsive and accessibility quality
criteria.full_credit: Repairs fixed geometry, drawer interaction, keyboard, focus, labels, touch targets, translations, reduced motion, and tablet adaptation.

criteria.label: Measurement-first performance
criteria.full_credit: Identifies render, filter, image, and layout hot paths and requires baselines, thresholds, and rollback conditions.

criteria.label: Detector and design-system reconciliation
criteria.full_credit: Treats static anti-patterns as contextual signals under project authority instead of fabricated runtime proof.

criteria.label: Concrete production fixes
criteria.full_credit: Provides implementation-ready state, error, layout, accessibility, scale, and recovery moves with acceptance conditions.

criteria.label: Evidence honesty and scope control
criteria.full_credit: Separates static proof from hypotheses, claims no unrun tools, stays read-only, and avoids redesign or unjustified dependencies.
